common.permissionDeniedBody: Your role in this company doesn't grant access to this section.

home.title: Moovo Hub
home.emptySubtitle: Create a company to start managing your delivery fleet.

companies.heading: Your companies
companies.signInSubtitle: Sign in to manage your companies, members, and jobs.

companyForm.createSubtitle: Create a company to manage members, fleet and jobs.
companyForm.name: Company name
companyForm.descriptionHelper: Optional. A short summary of your company.
companyForm.manageDenied: You need the company:manage permission to edit company settings.

members.removeConfirm: This person will lose access to the company. You can re-invite them later.
members.manageDenied: You need the members:manage permission to manage members.

fleet.label: Label
fleet.labelHelper: Optional. A friendly name like "Red Vespa".
fleet.maxWeightHelper: Optional. Defaults from the vehicle type.
fleet.deleteConfirm: This vehicle will be removed from your fleet.
fleet.noVehicles: No vehicles yet. Add your first one.
fleet.readDenied: You don't have access to this company's fleet.

dispatch.readDenied: You don't have access to this company's jobs.
dispatch.scopeNoticeBody: The jobs API is currently scoped to you (as sender or assigned courier). A company-wide dispatch feed needs a backend company-jobs endpoint. Live updates here cover jobs you are party to.

stats.jobsSampleNote: Based on your most recent jobs.
stats.readDenied: You need the stats:read permission to view stats.

login.title: Sign in or sign up
login.subtitle: to continue to Moovo
login.termsPrefix: By continuing, you agree to Moovo's

register.title: Create Oxy Account
register.subtitle: Sign up to get started with Moovo
register.termsPrefix: By continuing, you agree to Oxy's

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.failedToLogin: Failed to login. Please try again.
errors.failedToRegister: Failed to register. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to reset your password
forgotPassword.sentInstructions: We've sent password reset instructions to
forgotPassword.checkEmailToast: Check your email for instructions to reset your password.
forgotPassword.failedToSend: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Create new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset successfully. Please sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.failedToReset: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Help us improve Moovo
feedback.bugDescription: Something is broken or not working
feedback.rateExperience: How would you rate your experience? (Optional)
feedback.bugPlaceholder: Describe the bug you encountered. What happened? What did you expect to happen?
feedback.featurePlaceholder: Describe the feature you'd like to see. How would it help you?
feedback.improvementPlaceholder: What would you like us to improve? How could we make it better?
feedback.footerText: Your feedback helps us improve Moovo. Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts.
feedback.moreDetails: Please provide more details (at least 10 characters)

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Manage your notification preferences
notifications.pushDescription: Receive alerts about new messages and updates
notifications.permissionDenied: Notifications are blocked. Please enable them in your device settings to receive push notifications.
